retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional on success paths; on failure (NULL pointer), retries are not applicable as the object is gone or not present.
contract_summary: This function is the PCI remove callback for the amd76x EDAC driver. It releases a previously acquired PCI control structure reference (if global pointer is non-NULL) via a put operation, then deletes and frees a memory controller instance obtained from the EDAC core. The caller (PCI subsystem) must call this exactly once during device removal; after return, the driver's resources are fully released and the device must not be accessed again.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release two reference-counted resources (PCI control via edac_pci_release_generic_ctl, MC instance via edac_mc_free) on device removal. No business logic beyond NULL checks and sequencing.
